{"title": "Embarrassment Is the Key to Love", "description": "The vulnerability isn't being caught loving someone. It's wanting something so badly you can already feel its texture — and knowing you'd risk everything for it. That's where love actually lives. #Poetry #Shorts #WordsThatHit", "tags": ["poetry", "love poem", "vulnerability", "emotional poetry", "spoken word", "introspective quotes", "love and longing"]}
